description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, upload, prepare_release, and release. In the build stage define two jobs, build and build_llvm_mingw, both extending a common template that uses the Docker image ${CI_REGISTRY}/${CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE}/il2ge-docker-image:main, sets CMAKE_OPTS based on TOOLCHAIN and other variables, and runs the exact script commands: echo $TOOLCHAIN, echo $CMAKE_OPTS, mkdir build_${TOOLCHAIN}, mkdir install_${TOOLCHAIN}, mkdir artifacts_${TOOLCHAIN}, cd build_${TOOLCHAIN}, cmake $CMAKE_OPTS $CMAKE_EXTRA_OPTS .., make install, make dist-archive, cp il2ge.zip ../artifacts_${TOOLCHAIN}, make installer, cp il2ge-installer.exe ../artifacts_${TOOLCHAIN}; the build job sets TOOLCHAIN=gnu-mingw, the llvm job sets TOOLCHAIN=llvm-mingw, CMAKE_EXTRA_OPTS=-DCMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH=/opt/llvm-mingw, ENABLE_WARNINGS=0, and each uploads the artifacts directory as il2ge-build_${TOOLCHAIN}_${CI_JOB_ID}. In the upload stage add upload_job using curlimages/curl:latest, which needs the build artifacts, defines ARTIFACTS_DIR=artifacts_${RELEASE_TOOLCHAIN}, and runs two curl commands to upload ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/il2ge.zip and ${ARTIFACTS_DIR}/il2ge-installer.exe to ${PACKAGE_REGISTRY_URL} with the JOB-TOKEN header; it runs only when a tag is present. In the prepare_release stage add prepare_release_job that runs ./scripts/make-release-notes $CI_COMMIT_TAG CHANGELOG.md > release-notes, stores release-notes as an artifact, and also runs only on tag commits. In the release stage add release_job using registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/release-cli:latest, which needs upload_job and prepare_release_job, creates a GitLab release named "Release $CI_COMMIT_TAG" with tag $CI_COMMIT_TAG, description from ./release-notes, and attaches assets linking to il2ge.zip and il2ge-installer.exe at ${PACKAGE_REGISTRY_URL}; it runs only on tag commits.
